name: ea-agent
description: A virtual executive assistant for Claude Code — daily notes, task management, inbox triage, meeting notes, weekly reviews, and quick capture, all wired into Obsidian and Apple Reminders.

vault_path.description: Full path to your Obsidian vault (e.g., /Users/yourname/Documents/Obsidian/MyVault). Run /ea-agent:setup after installing to complete your profile.
